summary: Production QC Tracking Module - Phase 2 testing complete. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified and working - batch detail page, stage cards, move/inspect forms, activity log.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and integrations verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Production QC Phase 2 fully tested. Key features: 1) Batch Detail page at /production-batches/:batchId shows batch info, QC Pipeline summary (Unallocated/Total Rejected/Delivery Ready), and 4 stage cards. 2) Move operation: POST /api/production/batches/{batch_id}/move moves crates from unallocated to first stage or from previous stage's passed to next stage. 3) Inspect operation: POST /api/production/batches/{batch_id}/inspect records pass/reject with auto-calculated rejected count. 4) Stage balances track received/pending/passed/rejected per stage. 5) Activity Log shows movement and inspection history. 6) Validations: cannot move more than available, cannot inspect more than pending, passed+rejected must equal inspected. Stage IDs: QC Stage 1=a1b010e2-5489-4870-89ea-59765195f7a8, QC Stage 2=95bafa4c-f6ca-4047-a094-b038e7551898, Labeling=01373121-01eb-49b7-88e2-6c1b373afdbe, Final QC=3ffe56d0-51ad-4d05-b63a-1defa5a44506
